summary: Browser Use exposes a v3 REST API and a hosted MCP server that both use a Browser Use API key (`X-Browser-Use-API-Key`/`x-browser-use-api-key` from `cloud.browser-use.com/settings`), plus a local stdio MCP server via `browser-use --mcp` that needs `OPENAI_API_KEY` or `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, and a CLI cloud auth flow via `browser-use auth login`.

surfaces.name: Browser Use Cloud REST API v3
